decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: scattered — name, title, links placed around the viewport freely
nav_style: bottom bar — fixed navigation at the bottom
scroll_animation: none — everything static and immediately visible
hover_effects: expressive — tilt, glow, border animations, underline slides
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
border_radius: mixed — sharp sections with rounded cards
quirk: every section uses a different background color
bonus_quirk: add a tiny animated element somewhere (spinning gear, blinking cursor, floating shape)
